single_causal_variable: earnings-proximity context for existing A/B candidates
hypothesis: Existing trend/breakout candidates close to earnings with positive historical surprise context may have different forward quality or scarce-slot opportunity cost.

decision_basis: Observed-only unless the audited subset has enough cross-window coverage and quality separation to justify a later production-path ranking experiment.
